skill.name: maxhub-zhihu
skill.description: Zhihu (Chinese knowledge platform) data assistant. Queries user profiles, search results, columns, Q&A, trending topics, and comments through the MaxHub API.
skill.summary: AI-powered assistant for querying and analyzing Zhihu content including users, trending topics, articles, comments, and search results.
skill.author: XieWxx

security_audit.summary: This skill is a legitimate Zhihu data assistant that queries the MaxHub API (www.aconfig.cn) using curl and a user-provided API key. All 286 static findings are false positives: the external_commands findings refer to curl examples in markdown documentation, network findings refer to the declared API base URL, env_access findings refer to the explicitly declared MAXHUB_API_KEY dependency, and the weak crypto findings are triggered by parameter names like 'search_hash_id'. The critical obfuscation heuristic is a normal API client pattern - the combination of curl + API key + network is required for any API integration skill. No malicious intent or data exfiltration patterns detected.

medium_findings.title: Curl commands in markdown documentation interpreted as shell execution
medium_findings.description: Static analyzer detected 168 instances of Ruby/shell backtick execution. All instances are curl commands inside markdown code blocks serving as API usage documentation. FALSE POSITIVE - the skill is an AI prompt assistant, not an executable script. The curl examples show users how to call the MaxHub API endpoints.
medium_findings.confidence_reasoning: All 168 instances are curl examples inside markdown code fences. The skill defines no executable scripts, only reference documentation for API usage patterns.

medium_findings.title: Weak cryptographic algorithm detection from API parameter names
medium_findings.description: Static analyzer detected 56 instances of weak cryptographic algorithms. All instances are triggered by the parameter name 'search_hash_id' in API documentation tables, which is a Zhihu API parameter name, not actual cryptographic code. FALSE POSITIVE.
medium_findings.confidence_reasoning: All instances map to the string 'search_hash_id' which is a parameter name in Zhihu API documentation tables, not cryptographic code. This is a well-known static analysis false positive pattern.

low_findings.title: Hardcoded API URLs in documentation
low_findings.description: Static analyzer found 21 hardcoded URLs. All point to www.aconfig.cn which is the legitimate MaxHub API service endpoint. This URL is the declared API base URL for the skill. FALSE POSITIVE - the skill must reference its API endpoint to function.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: All URLs point to www.aconfig.cn, the legitimate MaxHub API service URL declared in the skill's own metadata. These are necessary for API documentation and authentication setup instructions.

low_findings.title: Environment variable access for API key authentication
low_findings.description: Static analyzer found 17 instances of env_access for MAXHUB_API_KEY. The skill explicitly declares this required environment variable in its metadata with 'sensitive: true'. FALSE POSITIVE - this is proper credential management hygiene with transparent declaration.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: The MAXHUB_API_KEY is explicitly declared with 'sensitive: true' and 'required: true' in the skill metadata. Usage is limited to the Authorization header for MaxHub API calls. This is standard API client authentication.

low_findings.title: System reconnaissance detected from API parameter descriptions
low_findings.description: Static analyzer found 9 instances of system reconnaissance. These are triggered by API parameter descriptions containing words like 'User ID' and 'Article ID'. FALSE POSITIVE - these are standard API parameter descriptions in reference documentation.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: Terms like 'User ID' and 'Article ID' are standard API parameter descriptions in the reference documentation. No reconnaissance behavior is implemented.

low_findings.title: Critical heuristic: dangerous combination of network, code execution, and credential access
low_findings.description: Static heuristic flagged the combination of curl execution, network calls, and API key access as a critical pattern. This is the standard operating pattern for any API client skill. FALSE POSITIVE - the skill must use curl + API key + network to query the Zhuhi data API. All operations are transparently documented and scoped to the MaxHub API base URL.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: The combination of code execution (curl), network (www.aconfig.cn), and credential access (MAXHUB_API_KEY) is the required operating mode for any authenticated API client skill. No evidence of data exfiltration or unauthorized API usage.

content.user_title: Search and analyze Zhihu content with AI
content.value_statement: Manually browsing Zhihu for user data, trending topics, and content analysis is time-consuming. This skill automates data retrieval from Zhihu through the MaxHub API, letting you search users, fetch profiles, analyze trending topics, and explore content with simple natural language queries.
actual_capabilities: Fetch detailed Zhihu user profiles including follower count, bio, and activity stats
Search Zhihu content across answers, articles, columns, videos, and ebooks
Retrieve Zhihu trending lists, hot topic recommendations, and video rankings
Access comments and sub-comments on Zhihu answers with sort options
Query Zhihu AI search results for intelligent content discovery
Analyze user relationships and subscriptions including followings and collections
limitations: Requires a valid MAXHUB_API_KEY from www.aconfig.cn to function
Data freshness depends on the third-party MaxHub API caching policy
Read-only access: cannot post, edit, or delete content on Zhihu
Rate limits may apply based on the MaxHub API service plan

use_cases.title: Zhihu Content Research
use_cases.description: Academic researchers and analysts can search for expert opinions, high-quality answers, and professional content on specific topics. The skill retrieves user profiles, article details, and related content for research synthesis.

use_cases.title: Brand Reputation Monitoring
use_cases.description: Brand managers can monitor discussions about their brand on Zhihu. Search for brand keywords, analyze sentiment in answers and comments, and track how brand perception changes over time.

use_cases.title: Trending Topic Discovery
use_cases.description: Content creators and social media managers can discover trending topics and high-traffic discussions on Zhihu. The skill provides hot lists, topic suggestions, and content analysis to inform content strategy.

prompt_templates.title: Basic topic search on Zhihu
prompt_templates.prompt: Search Zhihu for information about artificial intelligence trends. Show me the most relevant results with key details.
prompt_templates.scenario: User wants to find content on a specific topic

prompt_templates.title: User profile and article lookup
prompt_templates.prompt: Get the Zhihu user profile for user with ID 'example-user'. Show their bio, follower count, and list their recent articles.
prompt_templates.scenario: User needs detailed information about a specific Zhihu user

prompt_templates.title: Trending topics analysis
prompt_templates.prompt: Get today's Zhihu hot list and analyze the top 5 trending topics. For each topic, explain why it is trending and provide key discussion points from the top answers.
prompt_templates.scenario: User wants to understand what is currently popular on Zhihu

prompt_templates.title: Deep content analysis with comparison
prompt_templates.prompt: Search for discussions about electric vehicles on Zhihu. Find the most upvoted answers from the past month, identify the top contributors, summarize the key opinions, and compare the sentiment across different articles. Present the comparison in a table.
prompt_templates.scenario: User needs comprehensive analysis across multiple content types

output_examples.input: Get Zhihu user profile for user 'tech-writer-2024'
output_examples.output:
User Profile: Tech Writer
Bio: AI researcher and technology writer based in Beijing
Followers: 12.5K | Following: 340
Articles: 28 | Member since: 2018
Top topics: Artificial Intelligence, Machine Learning, Startups

output_examples.input: Show me today's Zhihu hot list
output: 1. AI Regulation Framework Released - 2.3M views - New government guidelines for AI development
2. Quantum Computing Milestone - 1.8M views - Research team achieves 1000-qubit system
3. Electric Vehicle Sales Report - 1.5M views - Q3 data shows 45% year-over-year growth
4. Space Telescope Discovery - 1.2M views - New exoplanet with potential biosignatures found
5. University Admissions Reform - 980K views - Proposed changes to entrance exam system

best_practices: Verify the MAXHUB_API_KEY is configured before making queries to avoid authentication errors
Use specific user IDs and precise keywords for more accurate and relevant search results
Combine multiple API calls in a single session for comprehensive multi-dimensional analysis
anti_patterns: Do not expose the MAXHUB_API_KEY value in responses, logs, or error messages
Avoid making redundant repeated API calls for the same data within a short time window
Do not assume API data is real-time without checking cache headers or response metadata

faq.question: Do I need an API key to use this skill?
faq.answer: Yes, you need a valid MAXHUB_API_KEY from www.aconfig.cn. The skill requires this key to authenticate with the MaxHub API service.

faq.question: Can this skill post or edit content on Zhihu?
faq.answer: No. This skill provides read-only access to Zhihu data. It cannot create, edit, or delete any content on the platform.

faq.question: What types of Zhihu data can I access?
faq.answer: You can access user profiles, search results, trending hot lists, articles, columns, answers, comments, video lists, ebooks, and topic data.

faq.question: Is the data from this skill up to date?
faq.answer: Data is fetched from the MaxHub API in real time, but some endpoints may have caching delays. Check the cache_url field in responses for freshness.

faq.question: Can I search for content in English?
faq.answer: Yes. The skill supports both Chinese and English queries. Responses are automatically presented in the language matching your query.

faq.question: What should I do if I get a rate limit error?
faq.answer: The API returns a 429 status code when rate limited. Wait before making additional requests or check your MaxHub API plan for higher limits.
